_comments: Content Embedding — uses OpenAI text-embedding-3-small for vectorizing content items.
Prompt type is 'Embedding' (not Chat) so the template is a simple passthrough ({{ text }}).
AIModelRunner uses this prompt for tracked embedding calls with AIPromptRun records.
Content items may have long text so a cloud model with a large context window is preferred.

fields.Name: Content Embedding
fields.Description: Embeds content item text into vector representation for semantic search and classification. Used by the content classification pipeline when vectorizing content items.

_comments: Tag Semantic Matching — uses a LOCAL sentence transformer (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) for tag embeddings.
Local model is preferred here because tag names are very short (2-5 words), there can be hundreds
to embed at server startup, and the similarity accuracy for short phrases is excellent with small models.
This avoids cloud API costs and latency for what is essentially a fast in-memory lookup operation.
The TagEngine uses these embeddings in SimpleVectorService for sub-millisecond cosine similarity matching.

fields.Name: Tag Semantic Matching
fields.Description: Embeds tag names and descriptions for semantic similarity matching in the TagEngine. Uses a lightweight local sentence transformer for fast, free tag resolution.
